(Before revising or drafting, read every single attached document and project files and instructions. Then before revising ensure that every single document that is listed in this document all 112 as read through entirely and is acted on meaning if something is mentioned it must actually be within the text actually happening within the text literally but not visually instead through story. Show everything do not tell a damned thing. And then again after revising for reference make sure that every single bold italicized and headline and title within this argument in all other documents is also adhered to and acted on perfectly 105.01%)...
